name: This Afternoon
detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a chance of rain and snow before 3pm, then patchy fog and a chance of rain and snow between 3pm and 5pm, then patchy fog and a slight chance of snow. Cloudy, with a high near 36. North wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
